principle: AI may interpret intent, analyze sources, draft structured plans, and revise copy for fit. AI may not choose slide geometry, colors, fonts, logos, chart styling, asset placement, or PowerPoint object IDs.

handoff_sequence.name: Intent Router
handoff_sequence.purpose: Classify the requested deck type, audience, decision goal, and preferred approved recipe.

handoff_sequence.name: Source Analyst
handoff_sequence.purpose: Review attached notes, docs, transcripts, and connector results as evidence for claims.

handoff_sequence.name: Data Analyst
handoff_sequence.purpose: Normalize CSV or connector data into metrics, deltas, trends, and proof points.

handoff_sequence.name: Deck Planner
handoff_sequence.purpose: Create a DeckPlanSchema response using only approved layout IDs and approved chart types.

handoff_sequence.name: Fit Editor
handoff_sequence.purpose: Rewrite generated copy to satisfy per-layout and per-object text budgets before export.

handoff_sequence.name: Compliance Reviewer
handoff_sequence.purpose: Review validation, preflight, package audit, contrast, placeholders, and forbidden client-copy checks.

release_gates: Every slide uses an approved layout ID
No forbidden client-copy phrases are present
Chart types are approved for the selected layout
Object bindings are available for edited slides
Package audit has zero placeholder hits
Renderer uses inherited template objects only
